root: Dynamically Updating AI Safety Concept Tool

notes.title: Regulate AI like the Fed regulates banks
notes.body: Most 'regulate AI' takes reach for an FDA for AI — a one-time approval gate before release. The Fed analogy points somewhere subtler: bank supervision is continuous. The regulator never stops watching. Continuous supervision, not a single gate.

notes.title: Goodfire — the world inside neural networks
Monitoring the EM fields of GPU / data centers
notes.body: Can you observe what compute is doing from the outside — side-channel signals, power draw, electromagnetic emissions — as a verification or governance tool? Seeing what's going on without needing to be let inside.
